prs_reviewed.title: backend: Fix backend data race / config file handling
frontend: Fix Chart useRef hook placement
frontend: NumRowsInput: Refactor state initialization using lazy state initializers
ci: Parallelize and speed up plugins-test
frontend: EditorDialog: Show a warning when content differs from the latest version
app: plugins: tools/releaser: Bump tmp to 0.2.6
build(deps): bump tmp from 0.2.5 to 0.2.6 in /plugins/pluginctl
build(deps-dev): bump vitest from 3.2.4 to 4.1.0 in /app

style_guide: Be concise but specific — reference exact file and line numbers for every finding
Commit format: 'area: SubArea: Description' with body for why, not just what
Flag missing trailing newlines in new files as a low-severity suggestion
Prefer 'Positive' findings for well-tested utilities and clean API design
Major version dependency bumps always require explicit CI verification note
React hooks rules (hooks must not be inside conditionals/loops) are HIGH priority
Missing error-state UI in query results is a Warning, not just a Suggestion
AuthVisible / RBAC patterns are authoritative for permission gating; deviations are HIGH
Storybook stories for shared components are welcomed — note trailing newline only
Lockfile-only PRs get APPROVE unless there is a major version bump or conflict
Dependabot duplicate / superseded PRs: note the conflict as Suggestion only
